scheme_name: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth

text_blocks.text: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth key fund facts. NAV: 44.3622. NAV date: 02-Jul-2026. Expense ratio: 0.2%. Minimum SIP investment: ₹100. Minimum lumpsum investment: ₹100. Fund size (AUM): ₹12,121.18 Cr. Riskometer: Moderately High Riskometer. Category: Commodities — Gold. Plan: Direct Growth.
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
Fund benchmark: Domestic Price of Gold.
The Scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Gold Exchange Traded Fund.
Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020). If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.

AA Arun Agarwal Feb 2023 - Present View details Education Mr. Agarwal is a B.Com. and Chartered Accountant Experience Prior to joining HDFC Asset Management Company Limited, he has worked with SBI Funds Management Pvt. Ltd., ICICI Bank Limited, UTI Asset Management Pvt. Ltd.
